name: frosted-obsidian
description: Glassmorphism dashboard aesthetic — frosted translucent panels over atmospheric scenes, white active states, semantic chart color. The visionOS/Raycast/Linear health-analytics look.
author: getdrip
signature_traits: All panels use rgba backgrounds plus backdrop-filter blur — never opaque #111 card fills
Main shell border-radius 32px with 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.18) rim — inner sections 20px, no inner shadows
Floating pill sidebar detached 24px from edge — not a full-height docked column
Active navigation uses solid white 40px circles with dark icons — not blue highlight bars
3:1 metric hierarchy — 36px values with 18px inline units, 12px labels
Bar charts use fully rounded top caps with percentage labels inside the bar — never square tops
Chart palette: yellow highlight, grey inactive — Recharts defaults always overridden
Semantic yellow for in-progress, green for complete — never tinted card backgrounds for status
Plus Jakarta Sans throughout — Inter and monospace metrics forbidden
Scene photograph or cool gradient required behind UI — glass must show depth through blur
